title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at IIFL Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at IIFL Finance
jsonLd.description:
IIFL Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IIFL Finance:
IIFL Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIFL Finance!
